title: phaseolus maculatus subsp. maculatus
intro: Phaseolus maculatus subsp. maculatus, commonly known as the spotted bean or black bean, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antibacterial agent. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including the potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of Phaseolus maculatus subsp. maculatus include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to support various aspects of health and wellbeing.
